seo.title: Sweet Carrots with Bite - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 50 g butter
  • 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped
  • 10 ml grated ginger
  • 15 ml cumin seeds
  • 2 tablespoons honey
  • 3 sprigs fresh thyme
  • 500 g frozen baby carrots, thawed
  • fresh chilli to taste, cut into cubes
  • salt and pepper

Method

Melt the butter in a large pan over medium heat.

Add the garlic, ginger and cumin and fry until fragrant.

Add the honey and thyme and let the sauce cook until it has thickened slightly.

Add the carrots and chilli to the sauce, put the lid on and cook until the carrots are 'al dente'.

Remove the lid, season to taste with salt and pepper and fry for a few minutes more until the sauce has thickened further and the carrots have caramelised.

Easy!
